SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT BERNIE MENDIA IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDIA, BERNIE $9,522.78 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,647.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
